doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_sub_si (mpfr/src/si_op.c L48-L65). Subtract a signed long `c` from an MPFR `b`. Trivial dispatcher: c >= 0 → mpfr_sub_ui(b, c, prec, rnd); c < 0 → mpfr_add_ui(b, -c, prec, rnd). Mirror of add_si with the operation swapped. The TS port handles LONG_MIN cleanly via bigint negation.
c_signature: int mpfr_sub_si(mpfr_ptr y, mpfr_srcptr x, long u, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
divergence_from_c: Same divergences as mpfr_add_si: bigint negation for c < 0 is overflow-free; the C unsigned-cast workaround is unnecessary. c is bigint in [LONG_MIN, LONG_MAX].
